title: Global Security
description: Overview of the Global Security Directorate at LLNL including its objectives and descriptions of its contributions to the Lab’s mission in intelligence, space science and security, nuclear threat reduction, energy and climate, cybersecurity and protecting critical infrastructure support to the U.S. Department of Defense; news stories; and invitation to apply for jobs in Global Security.
text:
Anticipate, Innovate and Deliver
The Global Security Directorate at Lawrence Livermore National Laboratory delivers responsive solutions to complex security needs in threat-relevant timeframes.
We serve the nation with multidisciplinary team science, enhancing national competitiveness by integrating intelligence, operational, scientific, technological and engineering (ST&E) expertise.
Our experts are comprised of ST&E staff, administrative, operational, IT and facilities teams. Partnerships across LLNL, the Department of Energy/National Nuclear Security Enterprise, industry and academia are essential to successfully executing our mission.
